cited_checks.note: arXiv:2405.00118v3, Theorem 2 establishes the strict-interior one-arm minimax lower scale in the d=O(n log n) regime; Appendix C.5 gives the control-zero moment-matching construction and Lemma 4 with Appendix D.2 transfers the Poissonized argument to a fixed sample. Its specialization has tau=psi_1.
